title: diasperus korthalsii
intro: Diasperus korthalsii, also known as the "Java tea tree" or "Korthalsii tea tree," is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family, native to Indonesia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Diasperus korthalsii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Diasperus korthalsii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
